---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Hyperion
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature address?

## 💭 Proposed Solution

How would you implement this?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about?

## 📊 Use Cases

Who would benefit from this feature? In what scenarios?

## 🎨 Mockups / Examples

Code examples, mockups, or links to similar features in other projects.

## 📎 Additional Context

Anything else relevant.
